mapper.select: SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.PROGRAM_ID , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , S.TOTAL_SEATS , S.AVAIL_SEATS , S.SESSION_NO , S.ONLINE_CAPACITY , S.OFFLINE_CAPACITY , S.ONLINE_AVAIL , S.OFFLINE_AVAIL , S.STATUS , S.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE S.SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.PROGRAM_ID , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , S.TOTAL_SEATS , S.AVAIL_SEATS , S.SESSION_NO , S.ONLINE_CAPACITY , S.OFFLINE_CAPACITY , S.ONLINE_AVAIL , S.OFFLINE_AVAIL , S.STATUS , S.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND S.SCHEDULE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND S.STATUS = #{searchKeyword}
ORDER BY S.EVENT_DATE ASC, S.SESSION_NO ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.PROGRAM_ID , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , S.TOTAL_SEATS , S.AVAIL_SEATS , S.SESSION_NO , S.ONLINE_CAPACITY , S.OFFLINE_CAPACITY , S.ONLINE_AVAIL , S.OFFLINE_AVAIL , S.STATUS , S.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND S.STATUS = 'OPEN' ORDER BY S.EVENT_DATE ASC, S.SESSION_NO ASC

SELECT DISTINCT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.EVENT_DATE, 23) FROM SCHEDULE S WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND S.STATUS = 'OPEN' AND S.ONLINE_AVAIL > 0 AND S.EVENT_DATE > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID, S.PROGRAM_ID, S.EVENT_DATE, S.EVENT_TIME, S.TOTAL_SEATS, S.AVAIL_SEATS, S.SESSION_NO, S.ONLINE_CAPACITY, S.OFFLINE_CAPACITY, S.ONLINE_AVAIL, S.OFFLINE_AVAIL, S.STATUS, P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.EVENT_DATE, 23) = #{eventDate} AND S.STATUS = 'OPEN' AND S.ONLINE_AVAIL > 0 ORDER BY S.SESSION_NO ASC

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.EVENT_DATE, 23) AS EVENT_DATE , COUNT(*) AS SESSION_CNT , S.STATUS , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOLIDAY H WHERE H.HOLIDAY_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE AND H.USE_YN = 'Y') THEN 'HOLIDAY' WHEN DATEPART(DW, S.EVENT_DATE) IN (1, 7) THEN 'WEEKEND' ELSE 'WEEKDAY' END AS DAY_TYPE , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DATE_PRICE_OVERRIDE DPO WHERE DPO.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID AND DPO.EVENT_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_PRICE_OVERRIDE , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DATE_SESSION_OVERRIDE DSO WHERE DSO.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID AND DSO.EVENT_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_SESSION_OVERRIDE FROM SCHEDULE S WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(7), S.EVENT_DATE, 23) = #{yearMonth} GROUP BY S.EVENT_DATE, S.STATUS, S.PROGRAM_ID ORDER BY S.EVENT_DATE

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.SESSION_NO , S.EVENT_TIME , S.ONLINE_AVAIL , S.OFFLINE_AVAIL , S.STATUS , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOLIDAY H WHERE H.HOLIDAY_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE AND H.USE_YN = 'Y') THEN 'HOLIDAY' WHEN DATEPART(DW, S.EVENT_DATE) IN (1, 7) THEN 'WEEKEND' ELSE 'WEEKDAY' END AS DAY_TYPE , DSO.ENABLED AS SESSION_OVERRIDE , DSO.REASON AS SESSION_OVERRIDE_REASON FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN DATE_SESSION_OVERRIDE DSO ON S.PROGRAM_ID = DSO.PROGRAM_ID AND S.EVENT_DATE = DSO.EVENT_DATE AND S.SESSION_NO = DSO.SESSION_NO WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.EVENT_DATE, 23) = #{eventDate} ORDER BY S.SESSION_NO

SELECT PTT.TYPE_ID , TT.TYPE_NM , #{sessionNo} AS SESSION_NO , COALESCE(DPO.PRICE, PT.PRICE) AS PRICE , CASE WHEN DPO.PRICE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_OVERRIDE , DPO.REASON AS OVERRIDE_REASON FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON PTT.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PRICE_TEMPLATE PT ON PT.PROGRAM_ID = PTT.PROGRAM_ID AND PT.SESSION_NO = #{sessionNo} AND PT.TYPE_ID = PTT.TYPE_ID AND PT.DAY_TYPE = #{dayType} LEFT JOIN DATE_PRICE_OVERRIDE DPO ON DPO.PROGRAM_ID = PTT.PROGRAM_ID AND DPO.EVENT_DATE = #{eventDate} AND DPO.SESSION_NO = #{sessionNo} AND DPO.TYPE_ID = PTT.TYPE_ID WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY PTT.SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO DATE_PRICE_OVERRIDE AS T USING (SELECT #{programId} AS PROGRAM_ID, #{eventDate} AS EVENT_DATE, #{sessionNo} AS SESSION_NO, #{typeId} AS TYPE_ID) AS S ON T.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID AND T.EVENT_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE AND T.SESSION_NO = S.SESSION_NO AND T.TYPE_ID = S.TYPE_ID WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET PRICE = #{price}, REASON = #{reason}, REG_DT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROGRAM_ID, EVENT_DATE, SESSION_NO, TYPE_ID, PRICE, REASON, REG_DT) VALUES (#{programId}, #{eventDate}, #{sessionNo}, #{typeId}, #{price}, #{reason}, GETDATE());

MERGE INTO DATE_SESSION_OVERRIDE AS T USING (SELECT #{programId} AS PROGRAM_ID, #{eventDate} AS EVENT_DATE, #{sessionNo} AS SESSION_NO) AS S ON T.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID AND T.EVENT_DATE = S.EVENT_DATE AND T.SESSION_NO = S.SESSION_NO WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ENABLED = #{enabled}, REASON = #{reason}, REG_DT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROGRAM_ID, EVENT_DATE, SESSION_NO, ENABLED, REASON, REG_DT) VALUES (#{programId}, #{eventDate}, #{sessionNo}, #{enabled}, #{reason}, GETDATE());
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DATE_SESSION_OVERRIDE WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND EVENT_DATE = #{eventDate} AND SESSION_NO = #{sessionNo}
